what_broke: Two profiles for the same events under different slugs: landrun-100.json duplicate of mid-south.json, and sbt-grvl.json duplicate of steamboat-gravel.json, inflating the race count
root_cause: AI-generated/batch-research profiles created the same race twice under alternate slug spellings
fix_applied: Removed landrun-100.json (kept mid-south.json) and sbt-grvl.json (kept steamboat-gravel.json)
regression_check: immune_check.py check_fuzzy_duplicates() — fuzzy name-similarity >= 0.88 flags near-duplicate slugs
verified: immune_check.py 2026-07-11: neither landrun-100.json nor sbt-grvl.json present; 757 profiles

what_broke: Bare /methodology/ path 404'd — the canonical page lives at /race/methodology/ and nothing redirected the bare path
root_cause: The .htaccess rewrite rules generated by push_wordpress.py had no rule for the bare /methodology/ path
fix_applied: Added `RewriteRule ^methodology/?$ /race/methodology/ [R=301,L]` to push_wordpress.py's generated rewrite rules (commit 01ce8558)
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() flags any dead same-site link as a YELLOW dead-link finding

what_broke: balatonfondo's published tier (T2) had drifted from its web-verified vitals — rankings claims had gone stale for months without re-verification
root_cause: No process re-verified published distance/elevation/field-size/prestige inputs against the live event after initial scoring
fix_applied: scripts/verify_race_rankings.py web-verified the vitals, recomputed Length/Elevation criteria from docs/GRAVEL_GOD_SCORING_SYSTEM.md, and recalculated overall_score/tier — balatonfondo dropped T2->T3 (commit 473c935d)
regression_check: immune_check.py run_profile_audit() (audit_race_data.audit_race) flags any future TIER MISMATCH between overall_score and tier; scripts/verify_race_rankings.py runs weekly (Thursdays) via .github/workflows/rankings-veracity.yml
verified: immune_check.py 2026-07-11: race-data/balatonfondo.json tier=3, score=56 (consistent, no TIER MISMATCH)

what_broke: 10 races had overall_score ~3pts higher than their criteria justified (violated round((sum_14+cultural_impact)/70*100))
root_cause: scores set/imported higher than criteria; cultural_impact=0 so not explained by bonus
fix_applied: recomputed overall_score for 10 races (Codex, human-verified 10/10); gfny-miami T3->T4
regression_check: immune_check.py score-math detector flags any overall_score != recomputed

what_broke: 11 races duplicated under spelling/hyphenation variants (e.g. granfondo-strade-bianche vs strade-bianche-gran-fondo)
root_cause: same event ingested twice with slug variants
fix_applied: removed 11 non-canonical dups (kept fuller/standard-spelling twin), regenerated index to 746; 5 L'Etape/Tor-Divide false positives left intact

root_cause: STALE deployed pages emitted a /tires/ link the current guarded generator no longer emits; not a code bug
fix_applied: regenerated + redeployed 746 race pages (clean of dead tire links) + purged cache

what_broke: Preemptive port of the Roadie Labs Jul 22 incident: their immune digest raised 18 false findings (2 money-path-404 RED + 16 dead-link) that were SiteGround 202 + sg-captcha bot-challenge responses, not dead pages; this repo's identical check_links.py had the same blind spot
root_cause: check_links.py treated any non-200 as dead; SiteGround's WAF answers challenged bots with 202 + sg-captcha instead of the page
fix_applied: check_links.py detects 202/sg-captcha as a WAF challenge, retries with 20s/45s backoff, and reports still-challenged URLs in a separate WAF-CHALLENGED block (exit 0); immune_check.py surfaces that as one YELLOW live-check-challenged finding
regression_check: immune_check.py run_live_link_check() emits live-check-challenged (YELLOW/low) on a WAF-CHALLENGED block; real 404/500s still produce dead-link/money-path-404 because only 202+sg-captcha is classified as a challenge
verified: roadielabs.com fix verified live 2026-07-22 (312 URLs all alive, exit 0); same code path

what_broke: Adversarial GPT-5.6-sol review of the same-day WAF fix found confirmed defects: serial 65s-per-URL backoff could blow immune_check's 900s subprocess timeout (~11+ challenged URLs given this repo's crawl-delay overhead); checker crashes were silent greens (returncode/stderr ignored); 202-OR-sg-captcha classifier downgraded real 404/500s carrying the header; challenged-only runs exited 0 (weekly workflow false-green); count-only finding detail gave unstable/lossy baseline fingerprints; WAF block header counted duplicates its rows deduped. Corrects the prior entry's overstated claims.
root_cause: first-pass fix reviewed only by its author; per-URL serial backoff and count-only reporting were design errors
fix_applied: Classifier tightened to exactly status==202; scan-wide 180s retry-sleep budget; challenged-only scans exit 2 (weekly workflow red as 'inconclusive', documented in link-check.yml); immune_check validates returncode against parsed output and emits live-check-failed on crash/parse-drift; challenged finding lists deduped URLs; deduped WAF/dead counts; challenged-seed coverage loss stated in summary line. Same hardening in road-race-automation and nordic-race-automation.
regression_check: tests/test_immune_waf.py (11 tests): classifier 202-vs-404+header, retry budget consumption/exhaustion, budget-fits-900s-timeout invariant, and immune parse of mixed/challenged-only/crash/drift/clean checker output
verified: pytest tests/test_immune_waf.py 11 passed; roadielabs twin verified live same day (312 URLs alive, exit 0)

what_broke: Weekly link-check red since Jul 2: full sweep found 239 dead URLs advertised by the live sitemap (215 stale /race/{slug}/tires/ pages whose tire_recommendations had been removed from race-data, 24 /race/{a}-vs-{b}/ pages dropped by a partial deploy), plus /feed/ 403 and a relative-URL 404 from href="gravelgodcoaching@gmail.com" (missing mailto:) on the Elementor /popular-training-plans/ page. Root cause: generate_sitemap.py builds from whatever sits in gitignored wordpress/output/, so stale local artifacts kept dead URLs in the deployed sitemap.
root_cause: sitemap generated from unreconciled local output dir; no existence check between sitemap entries and deployed pages
fix_applied: Archived 217 stale tire files + 24 undeployed VS dirs out of output/ (to ~/Documents/GravelGod/_gg-archives/); regenerated sitemap (2,144 unique URLs, zero dead, dirt-craft dup from a stray backup dir also removed); added self-healing 301s to REDIRECT_BLOCK (missing tires -> race page, missing VS -> first race or hub, /feed/ -> /feed/races.xml) that no-op when pages exist on disk; retargeted balkan/greek fabricated-race rules to /race/calendar/2026/ to kill 3-hop chains; hardened sync_redirects (refuse write on failed/unrecognized remote read + dated remote .htaccess backup); fixed the Elementor mailto via guarded wp eval-file (exact-count, JSON-validated, read-back verified, backup at ~/elementor-5027-backup-20260722-133240.json on server); link-check workflows (all 3 brands) now warn-and-pass on exit 2 (WAF-inconclusive) and stay red on real dead links. Pre-deploy adversarial sol review caught the dirt-craft dup, the sync_redirects wipe risk, cache-order, and missing 239-URL validation; sol's claim that black-forest-gravel/tires/ was live-200 was refuted (404 both UAs).
regression_check: weekly link-check.yml (red on exit 1 = real dead links); validate_redirects.py in preflight --deploy validates literal redirect rules incl. /feed/; post-deploy sweep verified all 239 formerly-dead URLs now 301-resolve to 200 with 0 failures
verified: 2026-07-22 post-deploy: 239/239 formerly-dead URLs resolve 200; live sitemap serves 2,144 URLs with 0 dead; /feed/ 301->races.xml; mailto live on /popular-training-plans/; validate_redirects ALL CHECKS PASSED; preflight_quality --quick ALL CHECKS PASSED; workflow run found 0 dead links (19 WAF challenges correctly classified inconclusive)

what_broke: Matti spotted template slop articles; triage found FIVE fabricated races (balkan-gravel, flint-hills-death-ride, grasslands-100, greek-gravel, natchez-trace-gran-fondo) still had LIVE template preview articles at /blog/{slug}/ linked from the live blog index, and live roundup articles still mentioned fabricated races in their text — the entire live /blog/ tree was a stale deploy predating the SITE-SYNC S3 fabricated-race cleanup (local output/blog was clean; live had 351 dirs vs 242 current). Also: server /blog/ held 109 orphan dirs from older preview generations, and the your-training-app article shipped with 2 broken img refs (illustrations never existed).
root_cause: blog tree deployed once and never re-synced after the fabricated-race purge; tar+ssh deploys add/replace but never delete, so stale pages survive every deploy
fix_applied: Regenerated roundups + blog index from post-cleanup race-index (excludes fabricated), redeployed 242 pages; deleted the 5 fabricated preview dirs + 104 stale orphan dirs server-side; added explicit 301s for the 5 fabricated blog URLs plus a generic self-healing rule (any /blog/ URL that exists as neither file nor dir 301s to /blog/); removed the 2 broken image blocks from the article and redeployed it; SG cache purged. Roadie Labs checked end-to-end (sitemap, server webroot, all dirs): NO articles exist there at all and none of the 10 fabricated slugs are in the road catalog — its backlog is fabricated-CLAIMS on real races (169, tracked), a different class.
regression_check: weekly link-check.yml catches dead blog links; generic blog self-heal rule prevents stale-URL 404s; REMAINING GAP: no automated check that live /blog/ matches generated output (stale-deploy class caught twice today) and no existence audit ever run on the road catalog
verified: 2026-07-22 live: all 5 fabricated blog URLs 301 to /blog/; orphan sample 301s; /blog/ index + roundups have 0 fabricated mentions; blog-index.json and current previews 200; article has 0 broken img refs

what_broke: WS1 of docs/specs/cleanup-program-jul22.md: 10 fabricated race profiles persisted in race-data with active derivatives (tire maps + race_appearances in 10/27 per-tire files feeding LIVE /tire/ pages with fabricated mentions, tp-sku-map, 4 route-geometry files, ~28 video briefs, 5 real profiles pointing at fabricated races via final_verdict.alternative_slugs), suppressed only by 7 copy-pasted exclusion sets; additionally generate_tire_pages.py SYNTHESIZED AggregateRating star ratings from recommendation counts (min(4.5,3.0+recs/50*1.5)) published as Product schema on 13 live tire pages with tests blessing it; /tire/ (166 live dirs) had NO deploy path (orphaned manual deploy, 12 stale dirs)
root_cause: SITE-SYNC S3 removed pages but kept profiles 'for the audit trail', spawning per-generator exclusion sets that each new surface had to remember; proxy-rating branch shipped as an SEO shortcut violating the real-submissions-only rule
fix_applied: config/tombstones.json = single canonical registry (slug+reason+redirect), 8 generators load it; 10 profiles + derivatives deleted (research-dumps/git history = audit trail); rebuild_tire_indexes tombstone-aware; synthetic-rating branch REMOVED (aggregateRating only from 3+ real approved reviews — 11 tires qualify; tests reversed); new sync_tire_pages() deploys /tire/ from fresh staging WITH remote reconcile (deletes orphans; first version had quoted-tilde rm no-op, caught by verification and fixed); 154 pages deployed, 12 stale dirs removed; /tire/ added to sitemap (was entirely absent — 154 indexable pages invisible to crawlers); immune gains tombstone-resurrection + tombstone-in-index RED checks; index-drift false signal (744v734) resolved by deletion; roundup generator gained GA4 (38 live roundups were analytics-blind since first deploy); rwgps floor re-pinned 202->198 (4 fabricated profiles had route ids)
regression_check: immune_check tombstone-resurrected/tombstone-in-index (RED) fire if any fabricated slug reappears in race-data or race-index; tests/test_tire_reviews.py asserts NO aggregateRating below 3 real reviews; preflight_quality GA4 coverage now covers roundups
verified: 2026-07-22 live: 0 fabricated mentions on all previously-dirty /tire/ pages; synthetic ratings gone (challenge-getaway-pro has none, maxxis-rambler real count 4); reconciled orphan 404s; 734==734; full pytest 6900+ passed (course/golden failures pre-existing from another session's dirt-craft push); preflight_quality ALL CHECKS PASSED; GA4 live on roundups
